test.name: TC1 - Adding shift in Ans roster for obs role

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Convert Date
kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.

kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Converts string to upper case.

kw.name: Convert Date
kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=136.0.7103.114); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidselectorexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549BCF45+75717] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549BCFA0+75808] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754788F9A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754790998] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754793A0C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754793ADF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547DED77] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547DF77C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7548325A7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7548073BF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF75482F39C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754807153] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547D0421] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547D11B3] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CBD71D+3223453] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CB7CC2+3200322] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CD5AF3+3322739] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549D6A1A+180890] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549DE11F+211359] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549C5294+109332] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549C5442+109762] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549ABA59+4825] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FF8FD977374+20] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FF8FEE9CC91+33]
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=136.0.7103.114); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidselectorexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549BCF45+75717] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549BCFA0+75808] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754788F9A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754790998] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754793A0C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754793ADF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547DED77] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547DF77C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7548325A7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7548073BF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF75482F39C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF754807153] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547D0421] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7547D11B3] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CBD71D+3223453] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CB7CC2+3200322] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF754CD5AF3+3322739] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549D6A1A+180890] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549DE11F+211359] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549C5294+109332] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549C5442+109762] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7549ABA59+4825] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FF8FD977374+20] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FF8FEE9CC91+33]
